items.name_en: M30317 Monogram (〽️Grade A Full Steel〽️) Personalized, chip changeable! Zippy Zipper Vertical Wallet. This Louis Vuitton Zippy vertical zipper wallet is crafted from Monogram Eclipse canvas, offering a stylish and practical design ideal for carrying credit cards and cash. It features a secure all-around zipper construction with multiple card slots, a zip coin pocket, and several bill and receipt compartments. 10 x 20 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M62369 Embossed (〽️Grade A Full Steel〽️) Personalized Custom Version! Changeable Chip, Emilie Wallet, This Emilie wallet is crafted from Monogram Empreinte leather with a classic Monogram embossed pattern and finished with a soft contrasting grained leather lining. The wallet features an envelope-style flap with a matching button snap for a secure closure, revealing an organized interior with a large compartment, zippered coin pocket, and multiple card slots.
